title: epidendrum strictum
intro: Epidendrum strictum, also known as the strict orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
